{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Naru family
| introduced = cradle-06-underlord
}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Naru family]] is a group that [[Lindon]] might be a secret weapon for.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
